CustomField.description: Auto-determines if the CPL Member account is eligible for scholarship application.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(College_Year__pc, "Senior"), Qualifying_Internship_Count__c >= 1 ), "Eligible", IF( OR( AND( ISPICKVAL(College_Year__pc, "Junior"), Qualifying_Internship_Count__c >= 1 ) ), "Nearly Eligible", "Not Eligible" ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-determines if the CPL Member account is eligible for scholarship application.
CustomField.label: Scholarship Eligibility Computed
